notes: The TSW-760 is a 7-inch PoE+ touch panel with a deliberate single-wire design: all power, data, video (RTSP/ONVIF), intercom, and control flow through the single RJ45/PoE+ connection. There is no discrete power inlet, RS-232, IR, or analog audio jack. Built-in microphone, speaker, and (on NC variant) 5MP camera are all internal with no external connectors. Multiple finish/camera variants exist (TSW-760-B-S black, TSW-760-W-S white, TSW-760-NC-B-S/-NC-W-S with built-in camera); all share the same I/O. Original -B-S and -W-S variants are discontinued; -NC variants are current.

ports.name: LAN PoE
ports.note: 8-pin RJ45 female; 100Base-TX, auto-switching/auto-negotiating, full/half duplex; IEEE 802.3at Type 2 PoE+ Powered Device — all power and data delivered over this single cable (no separate power inlet)

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB 2.0 host port; intended for optional Crestron room availability light bar or hallway sign accessories
